## What changed?

Describe the pricing change, new model release, or feature update.

## Source

Link to the official announcement or documentation:
- URL:
- Date announced:

## Impact on this skill

Which parts of the skill need updating?

- [ ] Model pricing tables (SKILL.md, references/model-routing.md)
- [ ] Model recommendations (new model available)
- [ ] MAX_THINKING_TOKENS guidance (thinking behaviour changed)
- [ ] Caching mechanics (cache pricing or behaviour changed)
- [ ] Cost estimates and benchmarks
- [ ] Settings format (new env vars or config options)
- [ ] Other

## Suggested changes

What specific numbers, tables, or advice should be updated?

## Before and after

```
# Before
Sonnet input: $3.00 per 1M tokens

# After
Sonnet input: $X.XX per 1M tokens
```

## Additional context

Any other information about the platform change.
